command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 8H2GiF9TtL9Hx6i.root --database 4ocuaVfrPR2qxUA9U855oL --execute 
UPDATE smsContacts 
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', phone)
WHERE LENGTH(phone) = 10 AND phone REGEXP '^[0-9]{10}$';
